parameters.name: TabbedPanel
parameters.description: Tabbed panel container. Each child node assigns a named slot: 'tab-0', 'tab-1', 'tab-2', or 'tab-3'. Tab bar labels come from the 'tabs' prop array. WidgetRuntime.TabWidget wires the click handlers after mount. Analogous to Perspective's Tab Container.

tabs.description: Ordered list of tab labels, e.g. ['Overview', 'Details', 'History']

id.description: Unique instance ID used by data-tabbed-panel attribute

parameters.template:
{{ #tabs }}{{ /tabs }}
{{ slot:tab-0 }}
{{ slot:tab-1 }}
{{ slot:tab-2 }}
{{ slot:tab-3 }}
